Open Questions for Landlord

  • ? Can the 1000 SF be combined with adjacent space?
  • ? TI allowance available for ISO-7 cleanroom construction?
  • ? Landlord approval for chemical waste disposal?
  • ? Lease term flexibility (start date, duration)?

CBRE Advisory

This LOI represents UpBeat Bio's first life science location. The licensed facility model provides flexibility compared to traditional triple-net leases but includes higher operational costs. The market lease alternative provides comparable space for ongoing operations. Recommend site visit and mechanical systems review before LOI execution.
